name: Bagani Anitun DXIII
spec: GM DEXRON III | Automatic Transmission Fluid
shortDesc: High-performance automatic transmission fluid. Excellent low-temperature flow, anti-wear protection, and friction control.
description: A high-performance automotive transmission fluid formulated from premium low-viscosity base oils and a complete additive package that includes viscosity index improvers, antioxidants, anti-wear agents, detergents, defoamants, and other specialized additives.
description2: Compatible with most commonly used sealing materials. Offers excellent low-temperature flow, anti-wear protection, and friction control. Meets GM Dexron IIID/IIIG and Ford Mercon IV performance requirements.

features.title: High-Temperature Oxidation Resistance
features.desc: Resistant to oxidation and thickening under high-temperature conditions, maintaining fluid integrity over extended service.

features.title: Excellent Low-Temperature Flow
features.desc: Pour point of -45°C ensures smooth transmission operation even in cold weather conditions.

features.title: Anti-Wear & Friction Control
features.desc: Advanced anti-wear agents and friction modifiers protect transmission components and ensure smooth shifting.

features.title: Seal Compatibility
features.desc: Compatible with most commonly used transmission sealing materials, preventing leaks and premature seal degradation.

applications: Automatic transmissions specifying Dexron III ATF
Power shift transmissions and hydraulic systems

faqs.q: Can I use Anitun DXIII in my automatic transmission?
faqs.a: Yes, if your vehicle specifies Dexron III ATF. Always consult your owner's manual to confirm the correct ATF specification for your vehicle.

faqs.q: Is Dexron III compatible with Dexron VI?
faqs.a: No. Do NOT use Dexron III ATF in transmissions requiring Dexron IV/V/VI, ATF +2/+3/+4, or Mercon V/VI. Using the wrong fluid can damage your transmission.

faqs.q: Can this be used in power steering systems?
faqs.a: Yes, Bagani Anitun DXIII is suitable for most power steering systems that specify Dexron III ATF.
